name: PetRageous Designs Fishbone Kitty Ceramic Cat Dish
description: Add a little charm to mealtime with the Fishbone Kitty Cat Dish from PetRageous Designs! This handmade ceramic stoneware saucer can stand to frequent use and cleanings and the design features a lovely cat silhouette against a white and taupe fishbone pattern across the basin. This 2.5-ounce dish the perfect size for serving up a delectable meal for your feline friend in style. Plus, it’s completely dishwasher and microwave safe so heating and cleaning are easy!
